raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I initiated a balance transfer of XXXX from my Citibank XXXX  cart to XXXX XXXX XXXX. Despite my clear instructions, those funds were transferred to XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX- an institution with which I have no relationship and to which I never authorized payment. 

Here are the transaction details Payment Amount {$2900.00} Payment Date : XX/XX/year> Customer ID : XXXX Trace ID : XXXX Funds Sent to XXXX XXXX XXXX  ( INCORRECT ) I began calling Citibank customer service, billing and even the fraud dept immediately and many tickets and cases have been opened. I have been calling every Monday ( which is my day off ) since this happened. In each instance I have been provided only with a XXXX ID confirming the misdirected transfer and not a resolution. This response is unacceptable. 

Citibank originated this error. The funds were sent to the wrong financial institution through no fault of my own. The passage of time does not extinguish Citibank 's responsibility to recover and correctly route funds that were misdirected by your institution. I remain with {$2900.00} that I am rightfully owed.
